mapper.insert:
SELECT FORMAL_SEQ.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO FORMAL ( ID, STANDARD, STYLE, STYLE_TEXT, VERSION, MERGE_WAY, SUM_WAY, QUARTER, END_TERM, START_DT, END_DT ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{standard}, #{style}, #{styleText}, #{version}, #{mergeWay}, #{sumWay}, #{quarter}, #{endTerm}, #{startDt}, #{endDt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE FORMAL SET STANDARD = #{standard}, STYLE_TEXT = #{styleText}, MERGE_WAY = #{mergeWay}, SUM_WAY = #{sumWay}, QUARTER = #{quarter}, END_TERM = #{endTerm}, START_DT = #{startDt}, END_DT = #{endDt}, UPDATE_DT = SYSDATE WHERE ID = #{id}
